ab: Tupa’un inaak tama ngaan tu Umas.
Tupa’un inaak tina ngaan tu Sani.
Haiza inaak tuqasnanaz, tupa’un naipa tu Laung, mas’an qan tas’a qamisan naipa laupaku.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫Laung，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is Laung, he is 11 years old.

ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: Mazima saak siin inaak tu tuqasnanaz tusasaus.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: Mazima saak sungqaqaul, maaq tu pal’uun a, muskun saam tastulumaq sungqaqaul.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: Mazima saak mapasaqaal baqlu tu kaviaz, maqtu saam tuskun tusasaus siin muskun sungqaqaul.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
